state_metadata.description: Metadata describing the backing state of the transit gateway and why it may be in an erroneous state.

reported_status.description: Reported status of the transit gateway from backing infrastructure.

reason.description: Reason why the transit gateway may be in an erroneous state, reported from backing infrastructure.
reason.example: Transit Gateway Attachment configuration could not find a resource with the provided ram share arn.

state_metadata.title: TransitGatewayStateMetadata

entity_version.description:
Monotonically-increasing version count of the transit gateway, to indicate the order of updates to the
transit gateway.

created_at.description: An RFC-3339 timestamp representation of transit gateway creation date.

updated_at.description: An RFC-3339 timestamp representation of transit gateway update date.
